description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stocky build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a long-sleeved, fitted sweater and straight-cut pants, both of which appear to be casual and comfortable. The figure's head is bald, and his facial features are neutral and mature. His feet are clad in open-toed sandals, revealing the toes. The clothing fits closely to the body, with no visible accessories or carried items. The overall appearance suggests a relaxed, everyday urban pedestrian, suitable for a variety of street or park environments.
description: A bald adult male in a fitted sweater and pants, standing in a T-pose with open-toed sandals. The figure has a casual, everyday urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, chest, and the arms extended horizontally, with clear visibility of the sweater and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and the straight fall of the pants, as well as the sandal on the left foot.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, sweater, and pants, with both arms extended and the back contours visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and leg, with the right sandal visible.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeved sweater and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
